entity.summary: Fully on-chain order-book decentralized exchange and smart liquidity aggregator on Monad, combining central-limit order books, automated-market-maker liquidity, token swaps, trading terminals, vaults, and developer APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Kuru as a fully on-chain order-book DEX and smart aggregator built on Monad. It documents swaps through Kuru Flow, a trading terminal, central-limit order books, integrated AMM liquidity, vaults, liquidity provisioning, SDKs, and APIs. Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX and aggregator volume. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted in this growth record.

evidence.title: Kuru — The Trading Hub for Monad
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Kuru as a fully on-chain order-book decentralized exchange and smart aggregator on Monad and documents Kuru Flow swaps, trading, vaults, liquidity provisioning, SDK, and API surfaces.

evidence.title: Kuru public DEX contracts
evidence.notes: Official Kuru Labs organization publishes the public Solidity DEX contracts together with current SDK and market-making repositories, corroborating the Monad order-book exchange implementation.

evidence.title: Kuru metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Current protocol profile identifies Kuru as a Monad smart aggregator and fully on-chain order-book DEX and reports current TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX and aggregator volume, supporting active classification.
